summary: Captured mobile evidence for Gate 6: 44px minimum tap targets at 390x844, tooltip open on tap, and hover-card open on tap.

artifacts.description: Mobile viewport screenshot (390x844) with UI controls measured for 44px minimum tap targets.
Bounding-box measurements proving target controls meet 44x44 minimum size.
Tooltip visible after tap interaction on touch/mobile viewport.
Hover-card content visible after tap interaction on touch/mobile viewport.
